claims.text: The auth guard fix is done and the route is now safe.
It probably failed because the middleware order changed in the last deploy.

alternative_hypotheses.alternative: The failure may come from a token-expiry config change rather than middleware ordering.
alternative_hypotheses.falsifier: A request trace shows the guard rejecting a valid, unexpired token before middleware reordering.

claims.text: The auth_guard regression test now passes.
Sessions are persisted in the billing database via the shared pool.
